subcodes.first_line: O esteemed lady! The cherished fruit of thy heart and the solace of thine eyes, thy gracious daughter, hath attained the honor of visitation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الست المحترمه ان فلزه کبدک و قره عینک ابنتک الکریمه قد تشرفت بزیاره
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for prosperity, @prayer for parents, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
